expectations.text: All 4 questions are answered directly — none are asked back to the user
expectations.evidence: All 4 questions answered in full with clear Recommendation sections. No questions asked back.

expectations.text: Answers reference Knowlune-specific features or context (not generic product advice)
expectations.evidence: References Epics 4, 5, 7, 9B, 11, 20, 21 by number. Mentions momentum scores, IndexedDB infrastructure, Ollama on Unraid server, open-core strategy ($12/month), specific files like E07-S02.

expectations.text: Each answer includes reasoning explaining WHY the recommendation is made
expectations.evidence: Every answer has an explicit 'Why' section with detailed reasoning.

expectations.text: At least 2 answers mention trade-offs or alternatives considered
expectations.evidence: All 4 answers have explicit 'Trade-offs' sections discussing alternatives (instructors vs solo learners, heuristic vs AI, smaller vs larger MVP, A/B testing rejection).
